blockers.description: Plan 04-03 is partially executed in an isolated worktree branch that is NOT merged to main. `/gsd-execute-phase 4 --auto`'s safe_resume_gate only inspects `git log` on main (not `--all`), so it WILL miss the orphan-branch commits and re-dispatch 04-03 from scratch, causing duplicate work + merge conflicts.
blockers.workaround: BEFORE re-invoking the orchestrator, inspect `git branch -a | grep worktree-agent-a8bd25cd031b6a9e7` and either (A) finish task 3 manually in that worktree and merge, or (B) explicitly clean it up before re-execution.

decisions.decision: validate.ts deliberately lives at src/pages/api/feedback/validate.ts (a routable Astro path) per PATTERNS.md D-15.
decisions.rationale: Co-located with submit.ts under the same trust boundary; PATTERNS.md mandates this placement.
decisions.consequence: Astro emits `[WARN] [router] No API Route handler exists for the method 'GET' for the route '/api/feedback/validate'. Found handlers: INTENTS, MAX_IMAGE_BYTES, ...` at every build. Build still succeeds. Non-fatal; flag for code review.

decisions.decision: When the SDK `worktree.cleanup-wave` helper reports failure but git shows the merge already happened, manually unlock + `git worktree remove --force` + `git branch -D <branch>` is the recovery path. NEVER run `git branch -D` until merge is confirmed on the orchestrator HEAD.
decisions.rationale: Wave 2 helper hit a mktemp `XXXXXX.json` template collision and reported `ok:false`, but the merge had ALREADY succeeded inside the helper; the orchestrator then ran `git branch -D` thinking nothing was merged → orphan commits. Recovered via `git merge <commit-hash>` from object store.

uncommitted_files: .planning/config.json (pre-existing — modified before this session started; unrelated to phase 04 work)
next_action: READ this handoff fully. Then `git branch -a | grep worktree-agent` to confirm the 04-03 orphan branch still exists. Then `cd .claude/worktrees/agent-a8bd25cd031b6a9e7 && git status && git diff` to see the dirty Task 3 state. Then either FINISH task 3 there (faster) or DISCARD + re-dispatch 04-03 (cleaner). Do NOT just rerun `/gsd-execute-phase 4 --auto` without addressing the orphan branch first — see blockers[0].
context_notes: Phase 04 is a 6-wave / 8-plan implementation phase for the v1.1 Batch Feedback Pipeline milestone. Waves 1-2 are merged cleanly to main. Wave 3 (plan 04-03) was 67% done when the executor's parent tool-result vanished mid-flight. Waves 4-6 untouched. AUTO_MODE is true (chain flag was active). After plan 04-03 finishes and merges, the orchestrator should continue waves 4→5→6, then code-review → verifier → roadmap update → transition. Branching strategy is `none` so all work lands on main. Worktree isolation is enabled (per-plan).
